verse_text: Then they returned from the tomb and told all these things to the eleven and to all the rest.

pericope.title: The Women Find the Tomb Empty

links.context: Peter knew by experience the failure to perceive the truth until he saw it with his eyes (see [[LUK.24:8]]-12; [[ACT.10:39]]-43). Here he addresses those who believe Him whom they have not seen. This is the faith of baptism and the faith of eternal life.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: The faithfulness of the women shows that in Christ, divine order is being restored to the fallen world. Whereas Eve was created to complete Adam ([[GEN.2:18]]), but instead led him to sin ([[GEN.3:6]]), now the women disciples remain faithful while the men flee and hide. It is the women who bring the message of the Resurrection to the men (16:9-11; [[LUK.24:9]]-11), thus restoring that which had been broken through sin.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
